creator: alex.deiter@gmail.com
text:
Found another panic on vent-enabled jail destroy:

panic: Assertion mtx_unowned(m) failed at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_mutex.c:1052
cpuid = 2
KDB: stack backtrace:
db_trace_self_wrapper() at db_trace_self_wrapper+0x2b/frame 0xfffffe00003946d0
vpanic() at vpanic+0x186/frame 0xfffffe0000394750
kassert_panic() at kassert_panic+0x126/frame 0xfffffe00003947c0
_mtx_destroy() at _mtx_destroy+0x50/frame 0xfffffe00003947f0
rm_destroy() at rm_destroy+0x33/frame 0xfffffe0000394810
tcp_fastopen_destroy() at tcp_fastopen_destroy+0x44/frame 0xfffffe0000394830
tcp_destroy() at tcp_destroy+0x10e/frame 0xfffffe0000394860
vnet_destroy() at vnet_destroy+0x13c/frame 0xfffffe00003948a0
prison_deref() at prison_deref+0x29d/frame 0xfffffe00003948e0
sys_jail_remove() at sys_jail_remove+0x1f2/frame 0xfffffe0000394930
amd64_syscall() at amd64_syscall+0x2f9/frame 0xfffffe0000394ab0
Xfast_syscall() at Xfast_syscall+0xfb/frame 0xfffffe0000394ab0
--- syscall (508, FreeBSD ELF64, sys_jail_remove), rip = 0x800e9e86a, rsp = 0x7fffffffe8d8, rbp = 0x7fffffffe960 ---
KDB: enter: panic
